# Simple demonstration: callgraph can't see which programs a script executes

# This test runs mcpdiff
exec mcpdiff --help
stderr 'Usage'

# If we ran callgraph on this test script itself, it would NOT show:
# - That this script calls mcpdiff
# - The connection between the test and mcpdiff's main()
# 
# Why? Because callgraph analyzes static code, not dynamic execution.
# Scripts execute programs through the OS, not through Go function calls.
#
# This is the gap our enhanced testcallgraph tool will address.
